summary: Implemented the Phase 9 local L1 prototype pipeline. It reads an idea JSON, generates index.html, manifest.json, and runbook.md under runtime/prototypes/local-ops-brief, validates the prototype through localhost HTTP 200, and writes runtime/prototype-validation/l1-prototype-report.json.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate N review. Do not activate real providers, deploy, external repos, PR creation, Web Console, IDE extension, auth, payments, or multitenancy until Gate N passes and a later activation proposal authorizes that scope.
notes: This is a deterministic local_tool pipeline; it proves L1 artifact semantics before provider generation.
Validation confirmed localhost HTTP 200 and expected content markers.
